name: Princess Peach | Stuck in a Warp Pipe..AGAIN
description:
"Oh come on not again!.."

Princess Peach Toadstool is the elegant ruler of the Mushroom Kingdom, making her debut in the 1985 Nintendo Entertainment System title Super Mario Bros., and the tritagonist of the Mario franchise. Not only does she rule the Mushroom Kingdom, her best friend is the ruler of Sarasaland, Princess Daisy, as well as popularly the love interest of Mario. She has been kidnapped by Bowser and his minions in nearly every game in the long-running Super Mario series, frequently being saved by Mario and Luigi, more often the former.
